title: rubus × carlovicensis
intro: Rubus × carlovicensis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or Carlow raspberry, is a hybrid of the wild raspberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × carlovicensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be consumed fresh as a fruit or used in jams and preserves.
